complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Scope Preview to 10s Window with Background Optimization
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Orchestrator preview_range param + gen_range logic; 2) BackgroundSource time-range cache keys; 3) Update SDXL/AnimateDiff/KenBurns for partial generation; 4) Full render gap-filling + cache reuse; 5) Docs/Gradio updates + manifest.json.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to multi-module changes (orchestrator, BackgroundSource, generators), precise cache key management to avoid quality regressions, dependencies on multiple prior tasks, and detailed testing for partial/full render consistency.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Bass-Driven Logo Beat Pulse with Low-Frequency Energy
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Audio analyzer bass energy extraction/envelope; 2) beat_pulse.py bass mode implementation + smoothing; 3) Config/UI sliders + fallback modes; 4) Cache + docs updates.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Involves audio signal processing (librosa RMS, filtering), real-time envelope computation, UI integration, and correlation testing; moderate due to potential audio analysis extensions but builds on existing beat grid.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Logo rim lights: line mask, silhouette, and fallbacks
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Line mask, silhouette, centroid computation utilities; 2) Confidence scoring + fallback logic + unit tests.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Image processing with edge detection (Sobel/Scharr), morphology, and geometric computations; requires deterministic cross-platform pixel tests.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Logo rim lights: traveling wave, radial field, and inward mix
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Polar coordinate transform + phase computation; 2) Radial falloff + line energy blending; 3) Distance transform inward weighting + premult output.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Advanced per-pixel shader-like computations (angular phase, distance transforms), multi-pass blending, performance-critical for video frames; high mathematical precision needed.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Logo rim lights: multi-color layers and smooth color motion
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Multi-layer colored emissive blending; 2) Hue rotation/drift + seeded variety + fallback halos.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Color space handling (linear/gamma), smooth temporal interpolation, determinism requirements; builds on prior geometry but adds hue math.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Logo rim lights: beat, snare, and bass modulation

complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Audio-reactive parameter mapping with temporal smoothing; moderate as it leverages existing audio features but requires precise timing alignment.
